## This session's scope: CONTENT ONLY

Sessions opened in `docs/{{SLUG}}/` write content for this guide.

**Do NOT edit the shell** — `docs/style.css`, `docs/main.js`,
`docs/sidebar.js`, `docs/guides.js`, `docs/home.js`, or `docs/index.html`.
The shell is managed by a separate shell session opened at the project
root. If something there needs to change (styling, the guides list, your
guide's home-page link), surface the request — don't fix it.

You may edit:

- `chapters/*.html` — chapter content (folder created when first chapter lands)
- `sidebar-data.js` — chapter list (flip `pending` → `done` as chapters land)
- `index.html` — the guide landing page

## Workflow rules

- Search the web (WebSearch, WebFetch) for references.
- Never move on to a new topic until James explicitly says he's ready.
- Answer questions conversationally first, then ask whether to add the
  answer to the site.
- Keep the **Topics covered** section above updated as each chapter lands.
